label: Meme
description: Defines an ideology meme - a core belief or value that shapes an ideology's precepts, style, rituals, and narrative. Memes come in two categories: Normal (impact 1–3) and Structure (impact 0).

iconPath.label: Icon path
iconPath.description: Texture path for the meme icon shown in the ideology editor.

renderOrder.label: Render order
renderOrder.description: Draw order for the meme icon on the ideology screen. Higher values render on top.

impact.label: Impact
impact.description: Ideological weight of this meme. Normal memes must be 1–3; structure memes must be 0.

category.label: Category
category.description: Meme category. Normal memes are regular beliefs; Structure memes define the ideology's core identity and require a descriptionMaker.

groupDef.label: Group def
groupDef.description: MemeGroupDef that this meme belongs to. Only one meme from the same group can be active in an ideology at a time.

exclusionTags.label: Exclusion tags
exclusionTags.description: String tags used to prevent incompatible memes from coexisting. Memes sharing an exclusion tag cannot both be active in the same ideology. Not translated.

selectOneOrNone.label: Select one or none
selectOneOrNone.description: A precept–thing selection group with a chance to select none. The ideology picks at most one precept from the listed pairs.

requiredRituals.label: Required rituals
requiredRituals.description: Ritual and building requirements forced on the ideology when this meme is active.

preferredWeaponClasses.label: Preferred weapon classes
preferredWeaponClasses.description: Noble and despised weapon class pair applied to ideologies with this meme.

randomizationSelectionWeightFactor.label: Randomization selection weight factor
randomizationSelectionWeightFactor.description: Multiplier applied to this meme's selection weight during random ideology generation.

requireAnyRitualSeat.label: Require any ritual seat
requireAnyRitualSeat.description: ThingDefs of which at least one must be available as a ritual seat for this meme's rituals.

deityCount.label: Deity count
deityCount.description: Range for the number of deities generated for ideologies with this meme. -1~-1 means the game uses its default count.

allowDuringTutorial.label: Allow during tutorial
allowDuringTutorial.description: Whether this meme can appear in the tutorial scenario's ideology.

factionWhitelist.label: Faction whitelist
factionWhitelist.description: FactionDefs whose ideologies are allowed to contain this meme. When empty, all factions may use it.

hiddenInChooseMemes.label: Hidden in choose memes
hiddenInChooseMemes.description: Whether this meme is hidden from the meme selection screen. Hidden memes can still be assigned programmatically.

generalRules.label: General rules
generalRules.description: Inline grammar rules used when generating text for ideologies with this meme.

descriptionMaker.label: Description maker
descriptionMaker.description: Grammar configuration for generating the ideology's description. Required for structure memes.

deityNameMakerOverride.label: Deity name maker override
deityNameMakerOverride.description: RulePackDef that overrides the culture's default deity name generator for ideologies with this meme.

deityTypeMakerOverride.label: Deity type maker override
deityTypeMakerOverride.description: RulePackDef that overrides the culture's default deity type generator for ideologies with this meme.

allowSymbolsFromDeity.label: Allow symbols from deity
allowSymbolsFromDeity.description: Whether the ideology can draw symbol packs from its deity when generating names.

symbolPackOverride.label: Symbol pack override
symbolPackOverride.description: When true, this meme's symbolPacks replace rather than supplement the candidate pool during name generation.

symbolPacks.label: Symbol packs
symbolPacks.description: Named symbol packs providing translated name words for ideologies with this meme. One pack is chosen at ideology creation.

fixedDeityNameTypes.label: Fixed deity name types
fixedDeityNameTypes.description: Explicit deity name–type pairs for structure memes. Only valid on structure memes.

thingStyleCategories.label: Thing style categories
thingStyleCategories.description: Weighted style categories influencing which visual theme is chosen for ideologies with this meme.

ritualsToMake.label: Rituals to make
ritualsToMake.description: Range for the number of additional rituals randomly added to ideologies with this meme.

replaceRitualsWithTags.label: Replace rituals with tags
replaceRitualsWithTags.description: Ritual tags. When this meme is active, rituals matching these tags are replaced with the meme's own ritual pattern.

replacementPatterns.label: Replacement patterns
replacementPatterns.description: RitualPatternDefs that replace existing rituals matching replaceRitualsWithTags.

consumableBuildings.label: Consumable buildings
consumableBuildings.description: ThingDefs consumed during rituals unlocked by this meme.

veneratedAnimalsCountOffset.label: Venerated animals count offset
veneratedAnimalsCountOffset.description: Offset added to the number of venerated animals for ideologies with this meme.

veneratedAnimalsCountOverride.label: Venerated animals count override
veneratedAnimalsCountOverride.description: Overrides the venerated animal count for ideologies with this meme. -1 means no override.

styleItemTags.label: Style item tags
styleItemTags.description: Weighted style item tags influencing hair, beard, and body decoration selection for pawns in ideologies with this meme.

worshipRoomLabel.label: Worship room label
worshipRoomLabel.description: Display name for the worship room required by structure memes. Required for structure memes. Must be translated.

startingResearchProjects.label: Starting research projects
startingResearchProjects.description: ResearchProjectDefs granted as already-researched at colony start when this meme is active.

addDesignators.label: Add designators
addDesignators.description: BuildableDefs added to the architect menu when a colony's ideology contains this meme.

addDesignatorGroups.label: Add designator groups
addDesignatorGroups.description: DesignatorDropdownGroupDefs added alongside addDesignators when this meme is active.

apparelRequirements.label: Apparel requirements
apparelRequirements.description: Apparel restrictions or requirements applied to ideology members when this meme is active.

agreeableTraits.label: Agreeable traits
agreeableTraits.description: Traits that are ideologically compatible with this meme. Pawns with these traits get a mood bonus.

disagreeableTraits.label: Disagreeable traits
disagreeableTraits.description: Traits that are ideologically incompatible with this meme. Pawns with these traits get a mood penalty.

preventApparelRequirements.label: Prevent apparel requirements
preventApparelRequirements.description: When true, this meme suppresses all apparel requirements from other memes in the same ideology.

xenotypeSet.label: Xenotype set
xenotypeSet.description: Xenotype distribution weights applied to pawns generated in settlements with this meme active.
